original_headline: Helping Founders & CXOs Build Visibility That Converts | Founder & CEO – Mevan Consulting | Speaker & Startup Mentor | UAE–India Market Access & Growth Strategy | Ex-HR Leader I UAE Licensed Creator
summary: I didn’t plan to become a Business Growth Enabler or Visibility Architect. I just kept saying yes — to transforming HR operating models, to scaling startups, to content creation with strategy and ROI. Somewhere along the way, I built a career helping others say YES to their next level.  Hi, I’m Meghna Dixit — a business connector, strategic growth partner, speaker, startup mentor, content & visibility strategist, mindset coach, and women’s empowerment coach based in Dubai.  My journey has taken me from HR boardrooms… to leading transformation projects that shaped some of the GCC’s biggest companies… to a season of content creation, where I built a 70K+ audience and learned firsthand how visibility changes everything.  That creator path turned me into a creator-preneur — and ultimately into the FOUNDER of Mevan Consulting, where I now help ambitious founders and leaders scale in the UAE–India corridor.  Today, my work sits at the intersection of strategy, content, and community:  • Helping founders break into the UAE with clarity and the right connections • Turning CXOs and brands into visible thought leaders with content that converts • Building communities where entrepreneurs and women leaders grow with confidence and belonging Over the years, I’ve partnered with startups navigating scale-ups, CXOs reinventing their personal brand, Indian founders entering Dubai’s booming ecosystem, and women ready to step into their next chapter of leadership.  I’ve also been invited to share this journey on stages from Startup India and iHub Gujarat to GITEX, Step Conference, and the Abu Dhabi Investor Summit — speaking on content as capital, market access, leadership branding, and women in business.  📌 If this sounds like you: • A founder ready to expand into the GCC • A CXO or creator tired of being invisible online • A brand looking for influencer-led visibility that drives ROI • An event or podcast host seeking a speaker who blends soul, strategy, and serious business acumen  …I’d love to be in your corner.  • Website → www.mevanbymeghna.com • Business leaders → Join Mevan Momentum Hub: https://nas.io/mevan-momentum-hub • Book a Content Strategy Audit → https://forms.gle/bcUqRHigJV9miNAD9 • Book a Consultation → https://forms.gle/Fv52yS6Mtb6TkRwW7  Because “Content is capital. Visibility is power. And growth? That’s inevitable when you work with me.”  Best, Meghna Dixit www.mevanbymeghna.com
organization_description_1: At Mevan Consulting FZE, we believe in the power of collective success. Founded by Meghna Dixit, a seasoned HR leader and transformation consultant with over 15 years of experience in the GCC, our mission is to empower startups, uplift women, and collaborate with like-minded brands to achieve greatness together. Startup Mentoring: We offer personalised guidance to startups, helping them overcome challenges and achieve long-term success. Our services include: - Strategic consultancy in operations and growth. - Establishing and expanding startups in the UAE market through collaboration with selected market access incubators and enablers. - Practical strategies for fostering innovation and business development. - One-on-one coaching sessions for founders and co-founders.  Women Empowerment Coaching: We are passionate about empowering women through: - One-on-one life coaching tailored to individual goals, providing compassionate support, proven mindset practices, and structured accountability. - Impactful workshops, networking events, and intensive skill-building sessions. - Collaborative workshops focused on mindset transformation and mental health, partnering with international coaches. - A holistic guided journaling program for personal growth.  Content Creation: As a business, lifestyle, and women empowerment influencer, we specialize in: - Strategic brand collaborations and promotions with ethical, cruelty-free brands. - Tailored content creation and brand ambassador packages for women-owned MSMEs in the UAE and India. - Dynamic collaborations with travel companies and tourism boards to promote women's retreats and spiritual tourism for mental health and self-love. - Engaging motivational speaking and authoritative panel discussions on women's empowerment, mentorship, personal branding, and community support globally. Join us on this journey of growth, empowerment, and success.
position_description_1: MeVan Consulting FZE: Ensuring Growth, Enabling Startups, and Entertaining Minds  MeVan Consulting FZE is a dynamic business catalyst founded by Meghna Dixit, a seasoned HR transformation consultant, empathetic life coach, women empowerment advocate, startup mentor, and angel investor. Our mission is to empower individuals, startups, and established brands to scale, transform, and thrive. Our Services: 1.	Startup Mentoring and Consulting: Whether you’re a budding entrepreneur or an established startup, we provide strategic guidance, mentorship, and actionable insights to accelerate your growth. 2.	Women Empowerment Coaching: We believe in lifting each other. Our customized and holistic coaching programs empower women to break barriers, build confidence, and achieve their fullest potential. 3.	Content Creation: Creativity fuels our passion. Through engaging content, we entertain, educate, and inspire. From blogs to videos, we captivate audiences and tell compelling stories.  #MeVanConsulting #Empowerment #BusinessGrowth

headline: Partnering with driven leaders who look successful on the outside, but are running on empty inside.✨Leadership and Mental Fitness Coach
original_headline: Partnering with driven leaders who look successful on the outside, but are running on empty inside.✨Leadership and Mental Fitness Coach
summary: Most leaders don’t burn out because they lack skill. They burn out because they’re leading on cortisol.  “I answer emails in my sleep—and wake up feeling behind.” That’s what Alex told me. Sharp. Accomplished. Exhausted.  I’ve heard this from many leaders. Truth is—I’ve lived it too.  Always “on.” Hitting goals, yet never feeling enough. Calm on the outside. Running on fumes inside.  We were taught success means grinding harder—no matter the cost. But here’s what I know now:  You can be ambitious and calm. You can lead without burning out. You can be ambitious without abandoning yourself.  That’s my work.  I’m a Certified Professional Coach & Positive Intelligence® Facilitator. I partner with anxious, high-performing leaders to rewire their relationship with success—so they lead with calm, clarity, and real capacity.  Not more hacks. Not more productivity tricks.  What you actually need is nervous system capacity. More presence. More energy. Calm that doesn’t need to be earned. Rest without guilt.  My path wasn’t linear.  I didn’t climb the corporate ladder, but I carried the same pressure where rest felt unsafe and stillness felt like falling behind.  Coaching helped me stop reacting on autopilot and start leading with intention. Less speed. Less force. More efficiency. More enjoyment. A version of success that finally felt like mine.  Now, I help others do the same.  Leaders come to me when they’re done faking “fine.” Because leadership is lonely when you carry it alone.  The shift we make: • From pressure → clarity • From coping → capacity • From impressive → fulfilling  📞 Book a no-pressure 1:1 conversation:https://ghadabkhalifeh.as.me/discoverycall 👥 Or join the next cohort for calm, conscious leadership

headline: I help organizations turn capable managers into leaders their teams actually follow.
original_headline: I help organizations turn capable managers into leaders their teams actually follow.
summary: Most leadership programs sound great on paper but in the real world, leaders don’t change through slides and theory. They change when they reflect, feel seen, and face their decisions — together. That’s why I created The Clarity Game™.  It’s not a training. It’s not a talk. It’s a gamified coaching experience that brings leadership teams into a room (virtual or physical) — and gives them space to think, question, listen, and grow. I work with HR professionals, L&D leaders, and CEOs who are done with surface-level development. They want real behavior change. They want leaders who can communicate, collaborate, and lead with clarity — not just talk about it.  What I Do: ✔ I help teams surface misalignment and build trust — fast ✔ I turn passive sessions into coaching simulations that unlock insight ✔ I guide leaders to define actions they’ll actually commit to — and track  Who It’s For: ✔ Growth-focused organizations ✔ People-first HR & L&D teams ✔ Service-based industries like tech, aviation, logistics, and beyond  Results: • A leadership team aligned around what matters • Measurable progress every 30–90 days • A culture of clarity, curiosity, and ownership If you’re building a coaching culture, or you’re tired of workshops that go nowhere — let’s talk.  Book a quick discovery call, or reach out here on LinkedIn. Let’s make clarity your competitive advantage.

We dive deep into real stories — not just the wins, but the turning points, challenges, and mindset shifts that shaped their leadership style. From building trust to navigating uncertainty, from decision-making to inspiring teams — we unpack it all through the lens of clarity.  This podcast is for: ✅ Managers ready to grow into impactful leaders ✅ Organizations looking to build a culture of listening and alignment ✅ Individuals curious about how clarity can unlock purpose, power, and performance at work  Follow the podcast and join me in the mission to build a world where leaders don’t just manage — they lead with clarity.
